description: Boolean behavior specification for composite (multi-category) category. Evaluator parses spec_json + execution_log + query to return boolean state per field. Consolidated to 3 headers × 3 criteria (9 total).

all_dependent_modules_identified.description: Agent mapped all modules that must change together for the composite task

no_contract_inconsistency_between_module.description: Module A's contract is not inconsistent with module B's expectations

touching_boundaries_sequenced.description: When write boundaries touch or overlap, agent sequenced changes rather than running parallel

cross_module_seams_tested.description: Integration tests cover inter-module seams for multi-module changes

phase_tracked_per_deliverable.description: Agent tracked red, green, and refactor phases separately — not conflating phase standards
phase_tracked_per_deliverable.check: phase_conflation == false AND (red_phase == true IMPLIES red_tests_tracked == true) AND (green_phase == true IMPLIES green_implementation_tracked == true)

inconsistent_state_detected.description: Agent detected and reported inconsistent module states

no_orphaned_modules.description: Agent did not leave any module in inconsistent state — dependency chain complete

module_completes_before_next_starts.description: Agent completed one module before starting next when boundaries touch

modules_synthesized_into_coherent_system.description: Agent synthesized all module changes into coherent system behavior — no isolated dumps
